products.title: Instant Water Heaters
products.description: Give your body the tender loving care it deserves, with Polycab water heaters. Combining innovations in hydrotherapy with traditional insights, these hot water marvels turn a daily routine into a wellness ritual, in the comfort of your home. Watch the dirt and fatigue wash away from your body. Feel the hot water gently massage your shoulders, neck, and back; soothing your body and mind in a matter of minutes. Before you know it, you will be fully charged and ready.

products.title: Dry Iron
products.description: At Polycab, our mission is to connect India to a better tomorrow. We have an enduring presence in millions of homes and our latest lineup of steam irons are a shining example of the same. Our steam iron can flatten out stubborn creases very quickly, whatever the fabric. Its innovative features make fatigue-free ironing a reality, churning out crisp clothes, day after day. Bring home this smooth operator and get ready to experience the next level of ironing.

products.title: COOLER
products.description: There’s nothing better than some cool comfort after a hard day’s work. Or some fresh breeze on hot and dry days. Now get everything you wished for, at the electricity cost of operating a fan… cool, isnt’t it? Presenting Polycab innovation range of air coolers! Designed for maximum cooling and any kind of space, it ushers in natural, healthy air; is easy to move and operate, and pocket friendly too. Bring home a Polycab air cooler; bring home a cool friend for life.

products.title: Steam Iron
products.description: At Polycab, our mission is to connect India to a better tomorrow. We have an enduring presence in millions of homes and our latest lineup of steam irons are a shining example of the same. Our steam iron can flatten out stubborn creases very quickly, whatever the fabric. Its innovative features make fatigue-free ironing a reality, churning out crisp clothes, day after day. Bring home this smooth operator and get ready to experience the next level of ironing.

products.title: Polycab 01Y-R SC 1100V AC IS 694
products.description:
Annealed stranded bare copper conductor , FR PVC insulated 1100V cable.

POLYACAB 01Y-R SC PVC cable, PVC insulated unsheathed cable confirming to IS 694 is suitable to use in electric power, lighting & panel wiring for indoor use in AC single phase or three phase (earthed or unearthed) systems with rated voltage up to and including 1100V. This cable is also suitable for DC systems with rated voltage uo to and including 1500V to earth.

products.title: Polycab MV Cu BS 6622 6.35/11kV
products.description:
Stranded copper conductor, conductor, screened, XLPE insulated, insulation screened, laid up, pvc inner sheathed, AL or GI wire armoured, PVC OR MDPE outer sheath.

6.35/11 (12) kV XLPE insulated with Copper conductor single & multi core cable is designed for power network, under ground application.

products.title: Polycab 02YY-R 1100V AC IS 694
products.description:
Annealed stranded bare copper conductor , PVC insulated , PVC sheathed 1100V cable

POLYCAB, 02YY-R flexible cable insulated and sheathed with PVC confirming to IS-694 is suitable to use in electric power and lightning for indoor and outdoor use in AC single phase or three phase (earthed or unearthed) systems with rated voltage upto and including 1100V. This cable is also suitable for DC systems with rated voltage upto and includng 1500V to earth.

products.title: Polycab 110 CY IEC 60227-7 Screened control Cable 300/500V AC
products.description:
Multicore copper conductor,PVC insulation,laid up, PVC inner sheath, ATC wire braiding, transparent PVC sheath cable.

300/500 V Multicore copper conductor,PVC insulation,laid up, PVC inner sheath, ATC wire braiding, transparent PVC sheath cable, suitable to use in plant engineering, Industry machinery, heating & air conditioning system, conveyor & transport system where EMC (electromagnetic compatibility) is prime importance. This cable conforms the construction generally as per IEC 60227-7.

products.title: Polycab AL type TC THHN/THWN-2 Cable
products.description:
Stranded compact aluminium conductor with THHN/THWN-2 insulation, accompanied with grounding conductor, sunlight resistant PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB Aluminium Type TC THHN/THWN-2 cable is recommended to use in commercial as well as industrial application as power, control, signal, communication and lighting cable. It is suitable to install in cable tray and also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct..

products.title: Polycab Festoon Flat 1.5Sq.mm
products.description:
Annealed plain flexible copper conductor, Thermoplastic PVC Insulated,Thermoplastic PVC. Sheathed 1100V flat cable.

POLYCAB Festoon Multicore Flat Flexible Cables are used in Hoists, Cranes and Lifts to carry the signals for all the controls required for the sophisticated Lift applications and Cranes/Hoist operations.

products.title: Polycab H05Z1Z1-F BSEN 50525-3-11 300/500V AC
products.description:
Multicore copper conductor,halogen free insulation,laid up, halogen free sheathed.

300/500 V cable insulated and sheathed with halogen free thermoplastic compound and having low emission of smoke and corrosive gases when exposed to fire. This cable intended to use for connection of domestic appliances to the fixed supply.

products.title: Polycab MV CU BS 6622 19/33kV
products.description:
Stranded copper conductor, conductor, screened, XLPE insulated, insulation screened, laid up, pvc inner sheathed, AL or GI wire armoured, PVC OR MDPE outer sheath.

19/33 (36) kV XLPE insulated with copper conductor single & multi core cable is designed for power network, under ground application.

products.title: Polycab 01Y-K 1100V AC IS 694 Twin Parallel & Twisted
products.description:
Annealed plain flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated 1100V cable.

POLYCAB, 01Y-K Twin Parallel & Twisted PVC insulated flexible cable confirming to IS 694 is suitable to use in domestic appliances and lighting application.

products.title: Polycab Classic 100 BK 600/1000V AC
products.description:
Flexible annealed plain copper conductor, PVC insulated and PVC sheathed flexible cable.

POLYFLEX CLASSIC 100 BK, fine wire flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated and sheathed cable is designed to use in Industrial application such as plant engineering, industrial machinery, power station and also suitable to use in dry or damp area with medium mechanical loads & in wind turbine generator.

products.title: Polycab Classic 100 CY 450/750V AC
products.description:
Flexible annealed plain copper conductor, PVC insulated, tinned copper braided and transparent PVC sheathed flexible cable.

POLYFLEX CLASSIC 100 CY, fine wire flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated and sheathed screened cable is designed to use in Industrial application such as plant engineering, industrial machinery, heating and air conditioning system, conveyor and transport system, servo drives and also in EMC sensitive environment.

products.title: Polycab Classic 100 SY 450/750V AC
products.description:
Flexible annealed plain copper conductor, PVC insulated, galvanised steel wire braided and transparent PVC sheathed flexible cable.

POLYFLEX CLASSIC 100 CY, fine wire flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated and sheathed screened cable is designed to use in Industrial application such as plant engineering, industrial machinery, heating and air conditioning system, conveyor and transport system, servo drives and also in EMC sensitive environment.

products.title: Polycab Classic 110 300/500V AC
products.description:
Annealed bare flexible conductor, PVC insulated, PVC sheathed 500V cable

POLYFLEX CLASSIC 110, 300/500V fine wire flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated, with oil resistant PVC outer sheath is use for fixed installation as well as flexible installation where tensile load is not much. It is suitable to use for torsional application in wind turbine and for power chain drive.

products.title: Polycab Classic 110 BK 300/500V AC
products.description:
Annealed bare flexible conductor, PVC insulated, PVC sheathed 500V cable.

POLYFLEX CLASSIC 110BK, 300/500V fine wire flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated, with oil resistant PVC outer sheath is use for fixed installation as well as flexible installation where tensile load is not much. It is suitable to use for torsional application in wind turbine and for power chain drive.

products.title: Polycab Classic 100 300/500V AC
products.description:
Flexible annealed plain copper conductor, PVC insulated and PVC sheathed flexible cable.

POLYFLEX CLASSIC 100, fine wire flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated and PVC sheathed cable is designed to use in Industrial application such as plant engineering, industrial machinery, power station and also suitable to use in dry or damp area with medium mechanical loads & also in wind turbine generators.

products.title: Polycab Classic 100 450/750V AC
products.description:
Flexible annealed plain copper conductor, PVC insulated and PVC sheathed flexible cable.

POLYFLEX CLASSIC 100, fine wire flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated and sheathed cable is designed to use in Industrial application such as plant engineering, industrial machinery, power station and also suitable to use in dry or damp area with medium mechanical loads & in wind turbine generator.

products.title: Polycab Classic 100 CY 300/500V AC
products.description:
Stranded AL conductor, Insulated with XLPO, Anti termite Jacket & Sheathed with XLPO 1500 V DC cable.

POLYCAB low smoke, halogen free, single core cable with electron beam cross linked insulation and sheath is designed to use for Photovoltaic installation at the Direct current side. These cables are suitable for permanent outdoor use under variable climatic condition.

products.title: Polycab Classic 100 SY 300/500V AC
products.description:
Flexible annealed plain copper conductor, PVC insulated, galvanised steel wire braided and transparent PVC sheathed flexible cable.

POLYFLEX CLASSIC 100 SY, fine wire flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated and sheathed screened cable is designed to use in Industrial application such as plant engineering, industrial machinery, heating and air conditioning system, conveyor and transport system, servo drives and also in EMC sensitive environment.

products.title: Polycab Cu Type TC/TC-ER Tray Cable
products.description:
Stranded tinned copper conductor with XHHW-2 insulation accompanied with stranded bare plain copper grounding conductor and sunlight resistant PVC jacketed cable

POLYCAB Copper Type TC/TC-ER XHHW-2 tray cable is recommended to use in commercial as well as industrial application as power, control, signal, communication and lighting cable. It is suitable to install in cable tray and also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct. Flexible stranded copper conductor, Low smoke zero halogen free XLPO insulation,laid up, inner sheath, ATC wire braiding, Thermoplastic polyolefin (Type TPO) sheathed.

POLYCAB HYDRO cables are designed to use in corrosive environments like Off-Shore & On-Shore oil rigs, Petrochemicals etc up to the voltage 2 kV. These cables can be installed in direct burial as well as in hazardous location.

products.title: ISOLATOR
products.description: Polycab Isolators can be used as a main switch in wide variety of applications. These isolators are tested according to IEC / EN 60947-3 standards and fulfill the requirements for isolation function.Utilization category ensures possibility of switching mixed resistive and inductive loads with low overloads. Isolators are produced in modular design with width one module unit for all versions up to 4-pole.

products.title: MCB
products.description: Miniature Circuit Breakers are electromechanical devices which protect an electrical circuit from an overcurrent. The overcurrent, in an electrical circuit, may result from short circuit, overload or faulty design. A MCB is a better alternative to a fuse since it does not require replacement, once an overload is detected. Unlike fuse, a MCB can be easily reset and thus offers improved operational safety and greater convenience without incurring large operating cost.

products.title: RCBO
products.description: Polycab Poly shield RCBO is a single composite device which provides protection against over currents, short- circuit and earth leakage faults, it comes in the same width and profile as that of a standard MCB. It is designed for use in domestic, commercial and industrial distribution systems at the most downstream circuit for ensuring high degree of protection to the user.

products.title: RCCB
products.description: Polyshield’s Residual Current circuit breaker for earth leakage protection. It is to be used in association with miniature circuit breakers, its function is to detect earth leakage current and open the connected circuit to protect people and equipment. These devices are designed to meet the Earth Leakage Protection Standards of the IEC: IEC/EN 61008-1,IS-12640-1.

products.title: ACCL
products.description: Polycab Automatic Changeover with Current Limiter (ACCL) is a fully automatic high precision micro-controller based system designed to provide power to critical loads where a backup generator is located, so that the generator may provide temporary electrical power if utility supply fails. It’s ideally suited for conservation of energy of standby Generators used in multistoried apartments, commercial complexes, industrial establishments, etc through limiting the current..

products.title: MCB CHANGEOVER SWITCH
products.description: Polycab MCB Changeover Switch is a manual operated changeover switch which finds its application in switching load between two power supplies. MCB Changeover switch finds wide applications in industries as well as in domestic area specially in Individual Bungalow(IB) for use in low voltage distribution circuits, wherever continuity of supply is necessary. It is used for switching to an alternate source of supply from main supply and vice – versa. The changeover switch comes in 2P and 4P versions, for single and three phase application respectively. It has three positions ( I-O-II) with centre-off. They are switch disconnectors with independent manual operation, capable of making, carrying and breaking currents under normal circuit conditions.

products.title: ACCL
products.description: Polycab Automatic Changeover with Current Limiter (ACCL) is a fully automatic high precision micro-controller based system designed to provide power to critical loads where a backup generator is located, so that the generator may provide temporary electrical power if utility supply fails. It’s ideally suited for conservation of energy of standby Generators used in multistoried apartments, commercial complexes, industrial establishments, etc through limiting the current..

products.title: ISOLATOR
products.description: Polycab Isolators can be used as a main switch in wide variety of applications. These isolators are tested according to IEC / EN 60947-3 standards and fulfill the requirements for isolation function.Utilization category ensures possibility of switching mixed resistive and inductive loads with low overloads. Isolators are produced in modular design with width one module unit for all versions up to 4-pole.

products.title: MCB CHANGEOVER SWITCH
products.description: Polycab MCB Changeover Switch is a manual operated changeover switch which finds its application in switching load between two power supplies. MCB Changeover switch finds wide applications in industries as well as in domestic area specially in Individual Bungalow(IB) for use in low voltage distribution circuits, wherever continuity of supply is necessary. It is used for switching to an alternate source of supply from main supply and vice – versa. The changeover switch comes in 2P and 4P versions, for single and three phase application respectively. It has three positions ( I-O-II) with centre-off. They are switch disconnectors with independent manual operation, capable of making, carrying and breaking currents under normal circuit conditions.

products.title: MCB
products.description: Miniature Circuit Breakers are electromechanical devices which protect an electrical circuit from an overcurrent. The overcurrent, in an electrical circuit, may result from short circuit, overload or faulty design. A MCB is a better alternative to a fuse since it does not require replacement, once an overload is detected. Unlike fuse, a MCB can be easily reset and thus offers improved operational safety and greater convenience without incurring large operating cost.

products.title: RCBO
products.description: Polycab Poly shield RCBO is a single composite device which provides protection against over currents, short- circuit and earth leakage faults, it comes in the same width and profile as that of a standard MCB. It is designed for use in domestic, commercial and industrial distribution systems at the most downstream circuit for ensuring high degree of protection to the user.

products.title: RCCB
products.description: Polyshield’s Residual Current circuit breaker for earth leakage protection. It is to be used in association with miniature circuit breakers, its function is to detect earth leakage current and open the connected circuit to protect people and equipment. These devices are designed to meet the Earth Leakage Protection Standards of the IEC: IEC/EN 61008-1,IS-12640-1.

products.title: Polycab Cu XHHW-2 Type MC Steel
products.description:
Solid or stranded copper conductor with THHN or XHHW insulation, green insulated grounding conductor, galvanised steel interlocking armour over the assembly with PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB Copper XHHW-2 Type MC Steel armour PVC jacketed cable is recommended to use in commercial, residential, industrial as well as non-patient care area of health care facilities as power, control, signal and lighting cable. It is suitable to use in theatre, audience area of motion pictures, television studio and similar location (NEC 520.5) and also in assembly occupancies (NEC 518.4). It can be used as branch circuits to swimming pool, hot tub and spa application as per NEC 680.14 and 330.12(2)(a) and (b); also in Class 1 div 2, class 2 div 2 and class 3 div 1 hazardous locations. It is suitable to install in cable tray (NEC 392) and also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct and also as arial cable on messenger

products.description:

products.description:

products.title: Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJO UL 62 300V AC
products.description:
Flexible copper conductor EPR insulated and CPE sheathed cable

POLYCAB Type SJO, EPR insulated, CPE Jacketed portable cable is extremely flexible, resistant to oil, moisture, and abrasion, makes it suitable for outdoor or indoor application. These types of cables are used to supply low voltage power to small motor of portable tools in maintenance shops, vacuum cleaners, office machines, outdoor extensions and where severe operating conditions exist.

products.title: Polycab LV AL IEC 60502-1 0.6/1kV MC-4 UA
products.description:
Multi core stranded AL conductor, XLPE/EPR/HEPR insulation, Laid up, Inner covering, Armoured, PVC/Polyethylene/Halogen free Outer sheathed LV Cable.

Multicore stranded Aluminium, XLPE/EPR/HEPR insulation, Laid up, inner covering,PVC/Polyethylene/Halogen free sheathed unarmored Cable suitable for fixed installation such as distribution network or industrial installation.These cables are designed for systems with rated AC voltage 1KV (Um=1.2 KV) between two live conductor.

products.title: Polycab 6181B BS 7211 SC 450/750V AC
products.description:
Stranded/Solid copper conductor, XLPE/Silicon insulated, LSZH sheathed 750 V cable.

POLYCAB 6181B BS 7211 SC stranded copper conductor thermosetting material insulated and halogen free material sheathed single core cable fulfils the requirement as per BS 7211. These cables are produced lower level of smoke and corrosive gases under exposure to fore compared PVC insulated cable and can be used for lighting and domestic appliances.

products.title: Polycab Instrumentation 500 (ST)PiMF
products.description:
Multi Pair copper, PVC/PE Insulation, Ind & Ovrl Screened,Inner Sheathed , armored/unarmored,PVC Outer sheathed cable.

POLYCAB INSTRU 500 MP, Stranded copper conductor, PVC/PE insulated, Individual & overall al-mylar shielded, armoured/unarmoured and PVC/LSZH sheathed cable confirming to BS EN 50288-7 are designed for transmission of analogue and digital signals in instrument and control systems. POLYCAB INSTRU 500 MP cables are used for diverse applications within industrial process for control, communication, data & voice transmission in oil, gas & petrochemical industries, cement, steel, fertilizers etc.

products.title: Polycab Al XHHW-2 Type MC AL Armoured PVC Jacket UL 1569 600V
products.description:
Stranded compact aluminium conductor with THHN or XHHW insulation, green insulated grounding conductor, interlocking aluminium armour over the assembly with PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB AL XHHW-2 Type MC Aluminium armour PVC jacketed cable is recommended to use in commercial, residential, industrial as well as non-patient care area of health care facilities (NEC 517.12) as power, control, signal and lighting cable. It is suitable to use in theatre, audience area of motion pictures, television studio and similar location (NEC 520.5) also it is allowable in assembly occupancies (NEC 518.4). It can be used as branch circuits to swimming pool, hot tub and spa application as per NEC 680.14 and 330.12(2)(a) and (b); in Class I Div. 2, Class II Div. 2 and Class III Div. 1 hazardous locations.

products.title: Polycab EHV AL CS+PB 66kV
products.description:
Compacted/stranded Milliken Aluminium conductor, Semiconducting taped, Semiconducting extruded, Crosslinked polyethylene insulated, Semiconducting extruded, waterblocking taped, Copper wire screened, helically applied copper foiled tape, semiconducting water blocking tape, Extruded metallic lead Inner sheath & Overall HDPE outer sheathed 66 kV EHV Cable

POLYCAB HV 38/66 KV (72.5 kV) XLPE insulated cable with Aluminium conductor is suitable to use in high voltage transmission for external and direct burial applications in power network system.

products.title: Polycab Cu XHHW-2 Type MC Steel
products.description:
Solid or stranded copper conductor with THHN or XHHW insulation, green insulated grounding conductor, galvanised steel interlocking armour over the assembly with PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB Copper XHHW-2 Type MC Steel armour PVC jacketed cable is recommended to use in commercial, residential, industrial as well as non-patient care area of health care facilities as power, control, signal and lighting cable. It is suitable to use in theatre, audience area of motion pictures, television studio and similar location (NEC 520.5) and also in assembly occupancies (NEC 518.4). It can be used as branch circuits to swimming pool, hot tub and spa application as per NEC 680.14 and 330.12(2)(a) and (b); also in Class 1 div 2, class 2 div 2 and class 3 div 1 hazardous locations. It is suitable to install in cable tray (NEC 392) and also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct and also as arial cable on messenger.
